title: Incorrect handling of 'TRUE' in compound select
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), active TINYINT DEFAULT 1);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE 1 = 1 AND name LIKE 'A%';
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE id = 2 AND 1 = 1;
key_bug_features: Incorrect handling of 'TRUE' in compound select
